title: item_added Event
description: User adds item to inventory through manual, camera-assisted, shopping conversion, or receipt-batch flows

source.description: Canonical save-time attribution for how the item was added

entry_method.description: Normalized item-entry funnel segment used for analysis

camera_used.description: True when any camera-assisted input contributed to the saved item

is_custom_category.description: True when the saved category came from a user-defined custom category

location.description: Storage location selected for the saved item

has_expiry.description: Legacy mirror of has_expiry_date retained for compatibility

camera_barcode_accepted.description: True when the saved item retained a camera-derived barcode result

camera_expiry_accepted.description: True when the saved item retained a camera-derived expiry date

camera_barcode_source.description: Origin of the accepted barcode suggestion, or 'none' when not applicable

camera_expiry_format.description: Detected OCR expiry format saved with the item, or 'none' when not applicable

item_id.description: Local item identifier for correlation with subsequent item events
